value.body:
## Outcome

Make the core ticket workflow reliable enough for daily use: create, triage, edit, discuss, link, archive, restore, search, and review history without dropping context.

## Scope

- Ticket authoring and updates
- Detail view, comments, timeline, linked records, and history
- Drafts, templates, markdown, and mention/tag support
- Search, command palette, and bulk triage

## Acceptance criteria

- A user can run their day from Cycle without leaving the desktop app for basic ticket operations.
- Core workflows have tests at API/usecase and renderer adapter levels.
- Failure states are visible and recoverable.
value.title: Roadmap: Production-ready ticketing core
